Skip to contents
MixedUpSlimSims 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Example Use of MixedUpSlimSims

Package index

Preparing data for and running SLiM

Functions for preparing inputs to SLiM, and then running them using SLiM.

cumulative_genome_position()
Add a column called cPOS that is the cumulative genome position
simulate_founder_genos()
Simulate genotypes for founders from allele frequencies
slim_sim_a_dataset()
Simulate a complete data set to run in MixedUpParents
write_input_vcf()
Write a tibble of genotypes into a VCF for input as founder genotypes in SLiM

Processing tskit Trees

Functions that operate on the tskit object created by SLiM, or assist in that process.

ancestral_segs()
return a tibble with ancestral population of different segments
founder_node_ids_and_pops()
get the ids and pops of founder nodes
get_focal_nodes()
Get list of nodes at which to determine ancestry segments
indiv_ancestry_tracts()
get ancestry tracts of individuals
read_and_filter_trees()
Read a tree sequence and retain nodes from certain populations at certain times
ts_nodes_and_inds()
return a tibble of the nodes and indviduals and meta data from a tree sequence

Summarizing the processed tskit trees

Functions for summarizing ancestry and pairwise relationships

admixture_fracts_from_ancestry_tracts()
calculate the admixture fraction of indivdiduals from ancestry tracts
pairwise_relationships()
Return pairwise relationships between the samples given the population pedigree

Simulating diagnostic markers

Placing diagnostic marker alleles according to the ancestry segments of individuals

place_diagnostic_markers()
Place diagnostic marker alleles within individauls according to their ancestry haplotypes

Plotting utilities

Functions that makes some useful plots

plot_ancestry_of_genomes()
Plot genome segments in focal individuals colored by ancestral population
plot_ancestry_tracts()
Plot the ancestry copy number along segments in a group of individuals

VCF files

Functions to read in the VCF output from the simulation and also to modify and write their contents

slim_vcf2tib()
Read a single SLiM-formatted VCF into a tibble of genotypes
slim_vcfs2tib()
Read in multiple SLiM formatted VCF file
tweak_slim_simmed_data()
Subsample SNPs or individuals and simulated genotyping error

Data sets for examples

Data sets of allele frequencies, etc. used as examples in the vignettes, or for other illustrative purposes

cyclone_creek_var_freqs
Example frequencies of alleles in two ancestries
example_indiv_segs
Example indiv_segs.
example_spp_diag_markers
Example data set of positions of species-diagnostic markers
mykiss_chroms
Chromosome raw and cumulative start and end points for rainbow trout (Oncorhynchus mykiss)
slim_sim_dataset_example
Example output of slim_sim_a_dataset()
wct_rbt_yct_diagnostic_markers
Diagnostic markers by name

On this page

Developed by Eric C. Anderson, Jared Grummer.
